content.fact_text: Implements a global Express error middleware to standardize API error responses and enforce production-grade observability and security.

provenance_data.behaviour: Exports a global error handling middleware for the Order API that sanitizes responses, performs structured logging, and maps domain-specific errors to standard HTTP status codes.
interfaces: handleDomainError(err: any, req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction): void
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized, production-ready middleware to handle, log, and sanitize application errors for the Order API interface layer.
